hypothesis: A hybrid Transformer-Mamba encoder-decoder model pre-trained jointly on multiple molecular representation modalities (SMILES, SELFIES, InChI, IUPAC, molecular formula, polymer, and electrolyte notations) will produce a unified latent space that aligns chemically equivalent structures across modalities, thereby enabling superior performance on molecular property prediction and cross-modal representation translation tasks compared to single-modality or unimodal baseline approaches.
